Bash(node -e "const{Pool}=require\('pg'\);const p=new Pool\({connectionString:'postgresql://nqerp:nqerp_secret@localhost:5433/ngoquyyen_erp_test'}\);p.query\('SELECT 1 as ok'\).then\(r=>{console.log\('DB OK',r.rows\);return p.end\(\)}\).catch\(e=>{console.log\('DB ERR',e.message\);process.exit\(0\)}\)")

Bash(node -e "const{Pool}=require\('pg'\);const p=new Pool\({connectionString:'postgresql://nqerp:nqerp_secret@localhost:5433/ngoquyyen_erp_test'}\);p.query\(\\"SELECT count\(*\) c FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema='public'\\"\).then\(r=>console.log\('tables:',r.rows[0].c\)\).then\(\(\)=>p.query\('SELECT count\(*\) c FROM \\"user\\"'\)\).then\(r=>console.log\('users:',r.rows[0].c\)\).catch\(e=>console.log\('ERR',e.message\)\).finally\(\(\)=>p.end\(\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const{Pool}=require\('pg'\);const p=new Pool\({connectionString:'postgresql://nqerp:nqerp_secret@localhost:5433/ngoquyyen_erp_test'}\);p.query\(\\"SELECT tablename FROM pg_tables WHERE schemaname='public' AND \(tablename ILIKE '%user%' OR tablename ILIKE '%session%'\) ORDER BY 1\\"\).then\(r=>console.log\(r.rows.map\(x=>x.tablename\)\)\).catch\(e=>console.log\('ERR',e.message\)\).finally\(\(\)=>p.end\(\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const{Pool}=require\('pg'\);const p=new Pool\({connectionString:'postgresql://nqerp:nqerp_secret@localhost:5433/ngoquyyen_erp_test'}\);p.query\('SELECT count\(*\) c FROM users'\).then\(r=>console.log\('users:',r.rows[0].c\)\).then\(\(\)=>p.query\('SELECT count\(*\) c FROM _prisma_migrations'\)\).then\(r=>console.log\('migrations:',r.rows[0].c\)\).catch\(e=>console.log\('ERR',e.message\)\).finally\(\(\)=>p.end\(\)\)")

Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const u=process.env.DATABASE_URL; if\(!u\){console.log\('NO_URL'\);process.exit\(1\)} const {execSync}=require\('child_process'\); const sql=\\"UPDATE \\\\\\"_prisma_migrations\\\\\\" SET migration_name='20260507130001_add_task_collab' WHERE migration_name='20260507093220_add_task_collab';\\"; console.log\(execSync\('psql \\"'+u+'\\" -c \\"'+sql+'\\"',{encoding:'utf8'}\)\);")

Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const {Client}=require\('pg'\); const c=new Client\({connectionString:process.env.DATABASE_URL.split\('?'\)[0]}\); \(async\(\)=>{await c.connect\(\); const r=await c.query\(\\"UPDATE \\\\\\"_prisma_migrations\\\\\\" SET migration_name='20260507130001_add_task_collab' WHERE migration_name='20260507093220_add_task_collab'\\"\); console.log\('rows updated:', r.rowCount\); await c.end\(\);}\)\(\).catch\(e=>{console.error\(e.message\);process.exit\(1\)}\);")

Bash(node -e "const{Client}=require\('pg'\);const c=new Client\('postgresql://nqerp:nqerp_secret@localhost:5433/ngoquyyen_erp'\);c.connect\(\).then\(\(\)=>c.query\(\\"SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='project_change_orders' AND column_name='importRunId'\\"\)\).then\(r=>{console.log\('column exists:',r.rowCount>0\);return c.end\(\);}\).catch\(e=>{console.error\(e.message\);process.exit\(1\);}\);")

Bash(node -e "const{Client}=require\('pg'\);const c=new Client\('postgresql://nqerp:nqerp_secret@localhost:5433/ngoquyyen_erp'\);c.connect\(\).then\(\(\)=>c.query\(\\"SELECT indexname FROM pg_indexes WHERE tablename='project_change_orders' AND indexname='project_change_orders_importRunId_idx'\\"\)\).then\(r=>{console.log\('index:',r.rowCount>0\);return c.query\(\\"SELECT conname FROM pg_constraint WHERE conname='project_change_orders_importRunId_fkey'\\"\);}\).then\(r=>{console.log\('fk:',r.rowCount>0\);return c.end\(\);}\).catch\(e=>{console.error\(e.message\);process.exit\(1\);}\);")

Bash(node -e "const{Client}=require\('pg'\);const c=new Client\('postgresql://nqerp:nqerp_secret@localhost:5433/postgres'\);c.connect\(\).then\(\(\)=>c.query\('DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS ngoquyyen_erp_shadow'\)\).then\(\(\)=>c.query\('CREATE DATABASE ngoquyyen_erp_shadow'\)\).then\(\(\)=>{console.log\('shadow DB created'\);return c.end\(\);}\).catch\(e=>{console.error\(e.message\);process.exit\(1\);}\);")

Bash(node -e "const{Client}=require\('pg'\);const c=new Client\('postgresql://nqerp:nqerp_secret@localhost:5433/postgres'\);c.connect\(\).then\(\(\)=>c.query\('DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS ngoquyyen_erp_shadow'\)\).then\(\(\)=>c.query\('CREATE DATABASE ngoquyyen_erp_shadow'\)\).then\(\(\)=>{console.log\('shadow recreated'\);return c.end\(\);}\).catch\(e=>{console.error\(e.message\);process.exit\(1\);}\);")

Bash(node -e "const{Client}=require\('pg'\);const c=new Client\('postgresql://nqerp:nqerp_secret@localhost:5433/postgres'\);c.connect\(\).then\(\(\)=>c.query\('DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS ngoquyyen_erp_shadow'\)\).then\(\(\)=>c.query\('CREATE DATABASE ngoquyyen_erp_shadow'\)\).then\(\(\)=>c.end\(\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const{Client}=require\('pg'\);const c=new Client\('postgresql://nqerp:nqerp_secret@localhost:5433/postgres'\);c.connect\(\).then\(\(\)=>c.query\('DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS ngoquyyen_erp_shadow'\)\).then\(\(\)=>{console.log\('shadow DB dropped'\);return c.end\(\);}\);")
